word: H6157 - עָרֹב - ʻârôb - aw-robe' - Divers sorts of flies

sections.paragraph:
Original: ערב

Transliteration: ‛ârôb

Phonetic: aw-robe'

BDB Definition:

  1. swarm
    1. probable meaning from 'mixture' and 'incessant or involved motion'

Origin: from H6148

TWOT entry: 1685c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
